title: Vanilla Frogtimiz
description:
Minecraft is not too empty now.
This modpack won't go beyond vanilla.
Just as this modpack was created by Mojang themselves
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6229bf2d4022842752acab2d4792cc334ff3f44.png)

-----------------------------------------------------------------
# Vanilla Frogtimiz will add the stuff that Minecraft have been needed

Minecraft world won't be empty now. It filled with brand new structures, mobs, biomes and blocks

However, nothing will go beyond vanilla. Only true vanilla mods

![New Structure and Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a668071ce71f4d1cc3f9ec9d7fc8ec18d25e204f_0.webp)
------------
![Blocks exapmle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cacf5d50a23dba0a168751cf89d9ac46f4f03412_0.webp)

That's not a structure, it's my build to show the new blocks

-----------------------------------------
## But Vanilla Frogtimiz not only adds, it's also updates the old features

A long wait End Update

![End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53e445fb72f517254ac0e6f716adf911b20cf331_0.webp)
----------------
An old structures update (Also deeper oceans)

![Monument](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c3d9d8daf9f39f2ba0c37e1817dd42865ab04cd_0.webp)

**_And there is much more! Good luck in finding it!_**
